summary: Draft EXP-211 ready for Phase A design refresh Item 4 (accuracy-math sidebar demotion). Consolidates both on-Overview accuracy-math callouts (hero scorecard Actual Failures sublabel clause + bordered accent box about headline accuracy being hardcoded) into a single sub-hero <aside> element with smaller pitch, preserving all arithmetic, all source-code critique, and all internal anchors. DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW + FOUNDATIONAL_MODEL_CHANGE per HNOTE routing rules. Integration blocked_until operator-posted HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN lands with approved_exp_ids containing EXP-211. Route to curmudgeon for adversarial review only — do NOT auto-integrate on any normal pipeline flow. Independent of EXP-202/207/208/209/210 (no strict ordering); visual coherence improves when bundled.

integration_hold.blocked_until: operator posts HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-NNN with approved_exp_ids containing EXP-211
integration_hold.reason: HNOTE-DESIGN-REFRESH-PHASE-A-001 hard-hold: every EXP carries DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW until named approval HNOTE lands referencing the specific EXP ID

curmudgeon_request_notes: Phase A design EXP — adversarial review before human-group iteration. Probe: (a) does aside pitch actually demote below hero scorecard? measure font-size/area/chrome ratios; (b) CC2 preserved? screenshot-test one-scroll reachability at 1080p; (c) content-preservation — diff the aside prose against the removed bordered-box prose and the stripped sublabel clause to confirm verbatim preservation; (d) NC5 computed-counts rule — grep aside HTML for hardcoded numbers/percentages; (e) dark-theme contrast for .92rem var(--ink-2) over #1a1a2e background — measure to WCAG AA; (f) defensive-rendering for empty accuracyVariantList — does the aside still render grammatically? (g) a11y: is <aside> + aria-labelledby the right semantic or should it be <section> with heading?
